priority_rules.critical: Valuation multiples — must populate for correlation analysis
priority_rules.high: Core driver metrics with expected >60% disclosure rate
priority_rules.medium: Derivable from components — search for inputs even if ratio not disclosed
priority_rules.low: Sparse disclosure expected — attempt but do not block on failure
priority_rules.skip: Market structure / contextual-only — excluded from correlation
